economic_notes: Operates hotel via Great Lakes Hospitality Group LP (11.5% interest), building supply via UCCM Building Material Supply LP (36.5%), solar energy investments via Wikwemikong Renewable Energy LP, retail store (Your Dollar Store With More), forestry via N'Swakamok Forestry Corporation, Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP interest (2.2337%), Rainbow Ridge Golf Course
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Consolidated entities include Wiikwemkoong Board of Education, Wikwemikong Development Commission, Wikwemikong Tribal Police Service, Wikwemikong Nursing Home, Wikwemikong Property Management Company Limited (Rainbow Ridge Golf Course), and FirstTEL Communications Corporation. Five entities accounted for using modified equity method. Total government transfers shown as ISC only as other government transfers are embedded in 'Other revenues' and deferred contributions breakdown; full breakdown not separable from statement. Prior year included $1,955,106 MAGS impairment loss as one-time item. Long-term debt schedule appears truncated in source document. Payable to Ontario Ministry of Long-Term Care of $2,429,074 represents cumulative overfunding at Nursing Home. Promissory note payable to ISC of $2,804,385 funds native land claim expenditures, non-interest bearing with no repayment terms.
